interpretation: Mem0 exposes NO contradiction/resolution API (matching methods found: []). On the same cross-session conflict pairs our audit detects+resolves, Mem0 stores/merges the conflict via a non-deterministic LLM at write time and, on recall, returns the conflicting values ranked by similarity with no conflict flag and no resolution recommendation. Retrieval is comparable (figure-recall@5 5/5); we claim parity, not a retrieval win.
